RDH Robotics

RF Hunter

Deauth. Jam. Capture. All Standalone

Rs. 1,899.00

Variant pricing

Quantity

1
Buy Now

Learn wireless security hands-on with a device built for it.

Three research modules

RF-Hunter: nRF24 constant carrier jammer for BLE + all 2.4 GHz or Wi-Fi channels only.

Deauther Suite: powered by the open-source spacehuhn deauther engine. Scan, select, deauth, beacon flood, and probe attack.

WiPhi: Deauth + EvilTwin + captive portal credential harvester with EEPROM vault.

Standalone controls

Everything is controlled from the 128x64 OLED display and keypad, or from any phone or laptop via the built-in web admin panel at 192.168.4.1. Captured data saves to onboard EEPROM and survives power cycles.

The firmware is fully open source. All three tools share a clean, consistent menu UI. Adding new research modules takes three lines of code.

What's in the box

RF-Hunter assembled and tested unit.

Quick-start card with default AP credentials and web UI address.

Specifications

Technical details

MCU
ESP8266 @ 80/160 MHz, 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi
RF module
nRF24L01+ PA+LNA
Display
1.3 OLED,
Input
6-button keypad
Storage
EEPROM with 5-slot credential vault
Interface
OLED UI + web admin panel, simultaneous
Battery
800 Mah 3.7V Li-Polymer
Connection
USB C
Charging
Built-in Charging
Firmware
Open source, Arduino/ESP8266 toolchain

For use only on networks and devices you own or have explicit written permission to test. Unauthorized use against third-party networks is illegal. This device is sold for educational and authorized security research purposes only.
